title: “Best friend’s grave”: Laura Loomer slams Candace Owens after she calls President administration satanic, drags Charlie Kirk into feud
summary_full: Laura Loomer and Candace Owens are in a public fight after Owens called Donald Trump’s administration “satanic.” Loomer hit back with a personal comment that hinted at Charlie Kirk. The debate quickly moved beyond politics into personal accusations. Owens also spoke about Tucker Carlson and shared strong views about global events and future political possibilities involving Erika Kirk.
